---
title: "08 Core Hub Gene Expression Validation"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(limma)
library(pheatmap)

# Global Parameters
logfc_cut <- 1
p_cut <- 0.05

# Data Import
# Import preprocessed expression matrix and hub gene list

# Data Analysis
# 1. Group differential expression analysis
# 2. Inter-group expression verification of core genes
# 3. Core gene correlation analysis

# Visualization
# Heatmap, box plot, correlation scatter plot

# Result Export
# Output differential expression statistics and visualization figures

# Result Description
# Explain differential screening thresholds and validation logic
